job.title: Full Stack .Net Developer @ Red Leaf Softwares & Services LLP (GJ, IN)
job.description:
**Full Stack .Net Developer**

**Overview:**

Red Leaf Softwares & Services LLP delivers innovative software solutions, specializing in enterprise applications and web

development, focusing on scalable, efficient, and high-quality technology solutions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Proven experience as a .NET Developer (1.5–2 years or more depending on role level).
* Proficiency in C#, ASP.NET MVC, .NET Core, and .NET Framework and Using ADO.NET to call a Stored Procedure.
* Strong understanding of OOP principles, design patterns, and software development lifecycle (SDLC).
* Experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Angular(preferred).
* Good knowledge of SQL Server (queries, triggers, stored procedures).
* Familiarity with Azure/AWS cloud environment (added advantage).
* Strong problem-solving, communication, and teamwork skills.

**Additional Information:**

**Red Leaf Softwares & Services LLP**

**Website:** www.redleafsoftwares.com

**Location:** 503, B-Wing, Gopal Palace, OPP. Venus Stratum, Nehru Nagar, Ahmedabad,

Gujarat - 380015

**Phone:** 7486866742

**Email:** hr@redleafsoftwares.com

**Office Hours:** 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM

**Weekly Off:** 1st & 3rd Saturday + Every Sunday

**Probation Period:** 3Months.

Pay: ₹25,000.00 - ₹30,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

job.title: Technical Lead Ruby on Rails Developer @ RAVSoft Solutions (TN, IN)
job.description:
***RAVSoft Solutions Virtual Interview for Ruby On Rails Openings for immediate joiners!!***

**About the Company**

RAVSoft Solutions is focused on providing innovative and high-quality software solutions to healthcare professionals. With its rich experience and expertise for 25 years, RAVSoft is one of the leading providers of Software development, Integration and Consulting services for the Medical Imaging, Informatics and Billing domain https://lnkd.in/gcbJxb3d.

**About the Role**

We are seeking senior developers eager to tackle challenging projects within the healthcare sector. The software engineer will help with developing web applications utilizing agile development and continuous deployment methodologies.

**Responsibilities**

* Responsible for and has expertise with web application development, particularly with a scripting language.
* The candidate is an experienced software engineer, familiar with agile development and continuous deployment methodologies.
* They will contribute heavily to the design and specification of core features of the product and will take ownership for the delivery and quality of those features.

**Qualifications**

* BSc or higher in Computer Science or related discipline.
* 8+ years industry experience.
* 7+ years building web applications with Ruby On Rails.
* Demonstrable success in and knowledge of front-end technologies such as CSS, HTML, and Javascript, React Js, etc.
* Excellent communication skills.
* Extremely motivated and passionate about learning new technologies and approaches to software development.
* Preferably Immediate hire / 15 days - 60 days notice period.

**Required Skills**

* Proven work experience with Python Full stack development and interested to learn and work with Ruby on Rails (RoR).
* Proven work experience in software development.

**Equal Opportunity Statement:** RAVSoft Solutions is committed to diversity and inclusivity in the workplace.

**Location:** This position is open to candidates who are available to work on hybrid mode at our Chennai office.

**Interview process**

* Level 1 – Technical Discussion/Hands-on
* Level 2 – Technical Discussion with Project manager
* Level 3 - Client Interview
* Level 4 - HR Discussion

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹1,000,000.00 - ₹4,500,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule
* Health insurance
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Experience:

* Ruby on Rails: 7 years (Preferred)

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Tidel Park, Chennai, Tamil Nadu

job.title: Senior Software Engineer @ Wells Fargo (TS, IN)
job.description:
**About this role:**

Wells Fargo is seeking a Senior Software Engineer.

**In this role, you will:**

* Involve in end-to-end lifecycle of product/application development, analyse highly complex business requirements, design and write technical specifications to build or modernize enterprise applications.
* Design and develop scalable, secure, and highly available full-stack applications using modern architectures and cloud-native technologies.
* Provide coding direction to less experienced staff and develop highly complex original code.
* Act as an expert technical resource for modelling, simulation, analytics, and AI-driven automation initiatives.
* Design and implement AI-powered features such as intelligent search, chatbot integrations, recommendation engines, knowledge assistants, and automated issue triaging.
* Leverage Generative AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Azure OpenAI, Microsoft Copilot) to improve engineering productivity and development efficiency.
* Build AI-assisted workflows for vulnerability analysis, incident management, operational intelligence, and application support processes.
* Develop and integrate RESTful APIs, microservices, event-driven services, and AI services into enterprise applications.
* Verify program logic by overseeing the preparation of test data, testing, and debugging of programs.
* Implement observability, monitoring, logging, and AI-driven operational insights across applications.
* Ensure applications adhere to Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL), Responsible AI principles, security, compliance, and governance requirements.
* Lead projects, allocate and manage resources, and mentor less experienced engineers.
* Drive DevOps and MLOps practices for application deployment, AI model integration, monitoring, and lifecycle management.
* Support vulnerability management platforms and develop automation to improve security operations efficiency.

**Required Qualifications:**

* 4+ years of Software Engineering experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education

**Desired Qualifications:**

* Core Development Skills
* 5+ years of application design, development, and implementation experience.
* 5+ years of Java and/or .NET development experience.
* 5+ years of Angular, React, JavaScript, and modern web application development.
* 5+ years of creating and/or integrating RESTful/SOAP web services.
* 3+ years of experience with Unix/Linux, Autosys, JavaScript, MVC, C#, SDL Tridion, and DXA.
* 3+ years of RDBMS integration and development (SQL Server, Oracle) and Spring Boot with JPA/Hibernate.
* Strong experience with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, AJAX, and responsive web design.
* Experience with Node.js is a plus.

* Hands-on experience integrating AI/Generative AI services into enterprise applications.
* Experience with Azure OpenAI Service, Azure AI Services, Microsoft Copilot Studio, or similar AI platforms.
* Understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs), prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), embeddings, vector databases, and semantic search concepts.
* Experience building AI-powered assistants, chatbots, automated knowledge retrieval systems, or intelligent operational dashboards.
* Experience consuming AI APIs and integrating AI capabilities into web applications and backend services.
* Familiarity with GitHub Copilot, AI-assisted development practices, and developer productivity tools.
* Exposure to AI governance, Responsible AI principles, security, compliance, and risk management.
* Experience leveraging AI for vulnerability analysis, incident summarization, automated ticket classification, root cause analysis, or operational intelligence is highly desirable.
* **Cloud, DevOps & Security**
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Gradle, SonarQube, GitHub Actions, or Azure DevOps.
* Understanding of cloud platforms such as Azure (preferred), AWS, or GCP.
* Exposure to containerization and orchestration technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Hands-on experience with Git and modern source control practices.
* Strong understanding of Secure Software Development Lifecycle (SSDLC/SDL).
* Experience with application security, vulnerability management, and secure coding practices.
* Familiarity with security scanning tools, SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, and vulnerability remediation processes.
* **Data and Analytics**
* Strong SQL skills and experience designing scalable database solutions.
* Knowledge of data analytics, reporting, and visualization solutions.
* Familiarity with vector databases, AI search technologies, and enterprise data integration is a plus.

**Job Expectations:**

* Experience developing AI-enabled enterprise applications at scale.
* Strong exposure to Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban), DevOps, and MLOps practices.
* Development experience with multi-tier enterprise applications and microservices architecture.
* Experience building cloud-native applications and AI-integrated solutions.
* Strong communication, collaboration, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to lead technical discussions with architects, engineering leaders, and senior management.
* Experience working in Security Operations, Vulnerability Management, Risk Management, or Stability Operations environments.
* Microsoft Azure AI Engineer, Azure Developer, Azure Solutions Architect, Security Engineer, or related certifications are highly desirable.
* Experience with observability platforms such as App Insights, ELK, Grafana, Splunk, or Datadog is preferred.
* Exposure to Agile methodologies and JIRA for project tracking.

**Posting End Date:**

30 Aug 2026

* ***Job posting may come down early due to volume of applicants.***

**We Value Equal Opportunity**

Wells Fargo is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other legally protected characteristic.

Employees support our focus on building strong customer relationships balanced with a strong risk mitigating and compliance-driven culture which firmly establishes those disciplines as critical to the success of our customers and company. They are accountable for execution of all applicable risk programs (Credit, Market, Financial Crimes, Operational, Regulatory Compliance), which includes effectively following and adhering to applicable Wells Fargo policies and procedures, appropriately fulfilling risk and compliance obligations, timely and effective escalation and remediation of issues, and making sound risk decisions. There is emphasis on proactive monitoring, governance, risk identification and escalation, as well as making sound risk decisions commensurate with the business unit’s risk appetite and all risk and compliance program requirements.

Candidates applying to job openings posted in Canada: Applications for employment are encouraged from all qualified candidates, including women, persons with disabilities, aboriginal peoples and visible minorities. Accommodation for applicants with disabilities is available upon request in connection with the recruitment process.

**Applicants with Disabilities**

To request a medical accommodation during the application or interview process, visit Disability Inclusion at Wells Fargo.

**Drug and Alcohol Policy**

Wells Fargo maintains a drug free workplace. Please see our Drug and Alcohol Policy to learn more.

**Wells Fargo Recruitment and Hiring Requirements:**

a. Third-Party recordings are prohibited unless authorized by Wells Fargo.

b. Wells Fargo requires you to directly represent your own experiences during the recruiting and hiring process.

job.title: Senior Software Engineer - Golang and/or Python @ Wells Fargo (KA, IN)
job.description:
**About this role:**

Wells Fargo is seeking a Senior Software Engineer.

**In this role, you will:**

* Lead moderately complex initiatives and deliverables within technical domain environments
* Contribute to large scale planning of strategies
* Design, code, test, debug, and document for projects and programs associated with technology domain, including upgrades and deployments
* Review moderately complex technical challenges that require an in-depth evaluation of technologies and procedures
* Resolve moderately complex issues and lead a team to meet existing client needs or potential new clients needs while leveraging solid understanding of the function, policies, procedures, or compliance requirements
* Collaborate and consult with peers, colleagues, and mid-level managers to resolve technical challenges and achieve goals
* Lead projects and act as an escalation point, provide guidance and direction to less experienced staff

**Required Qualifications:**

* 4+ years of Software Engineering experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education

**Desired Qualifications:**

* 4+ years of professional software development experience using **Golang and/or Python**.
* Strong expertise in designing and building **cloud-native, containerized applications**.
* Hands-on experience with **Kubernetes/OpenShift** in development and production environments.
* Experience building solutions on **AWS, Azure, or GCP**, including cloud-native services.
* Strong understanding of **microservices architecture, distributed systems, resiliency, scalability, and security best practices**.
* Experience designing and implementing **CI/CD pipelines**, Infrastructure as Code, and automated deployment strategies.
* Proven expertise in **test automation**, integration testing, performance testing, and software quality engineering.
* Experience with observability stacks such as **Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, ELK/Splunk**, or similar tools.
* Ability to mentor junior engineers and drive engineering best practices.
* Experience working across cross-functional teams to deliver complex software solutions.
* Work Location - Bangalore / Hyderabad.

**Job Expectations:**

* A Senior Software Engineer should act as a **platform engineering expert who can design, build, automate, secure, operate, and modernize cloud-native platforms while leveraging AI-driven capabilities to improve developer productivity, platform reliability, and operational efficiency.**

**Posting End Date:**

30 Aug 2026

* ***Job posting may come down early due to volume of applicants.***

**We Value Equal Opportunity**

Wells Fargo is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other legally protected characteristic.

Employees support our focus on building strong customer relationships balanced with a strong risk mitigating and compliance-driven culture which firmly establishes those disciplines as critical to the success of our customers and company. They are accountable for execution of all applicable risk programs (Credit, Market, Financial Crimes, Operational, Regulatory Compliance), which includes effectively following and adhering to applicable Wells Fargo policies and procedures, appropriately fulfilling risk and compliance obligations, timely and effective escalation and remediation of issues, and making sound risk decisions. There is emphasis on proactive monitoring, governance, risk identification and escalation, as well as making sound risk decisions commensurate with the business unit’s risk appetite and all risk and compliance program requirements.

Candidates applying to job openings posted in Canada: Applications for employment are encouraged from all qualified candidates, including women, persons with disabilities, aboriginal peoples and visible minorities. Accommodation for applicants with disabilities is available upon request in connection with the recruitment process.

**Applicants with Disabilities**

To request a medical accommodation during the application or interview process, visit Disability Inclusion at Wells Fargo.

**Drug and Alcohol Policy**

Wells Fargo maintains a drug free workplace. Please see our Drug and Alcohol Policy to learn more.

**Wells Fargo Recruitment and Hiring Requirements:**

a. Third-Party recordings are prohibited unless authorized by Wells Fargo.

b. Wells Fargo requires you to directly represent your own experiences during the recruiting and hiring process.

job.title: TECHNOLOGY ARCHITECT L1 @ Wipro (KA, IN)
job.description:
Job Description #body.unify div.unify-button-container .unify-apply-now: focus, #body.unify div.unify-button-container .unify-apply-#body.unify div.unify-button-container .unify-apply-now: focus, #body.unify div.unify-button-container .unify-apply-
  
**Job Title:** TECHNOLOGY ARCHITECT L1
  
**City:** Bengaluru
  
**State/Province:** Karnataka
  
**Posting Start Date:** 7/20/26
  
**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  
**Job Description:**  
Job Description
  
  
Role Purpose
  
  
The purpose of this role to analyse client technology environments, create low-level design inputs, and integrate technology components to existing client environment for a specific technology.
  
  
͏
  
  
Area of Responsibility
  
  
Requirement Analysis-Participate in client discussions to gather information regarding platform constraints, technology stacks, and performance expectations of a specific technology.
  
  
Designing-Create low-level design inputs for assigned technology and provides technical viewpoints for specific components as per the standards and best practices.
  
  
Integration assessment and support-Assess and evaluate client technology environment to support integration of technology components and ensure system-level technical compatibility.
  
  
Troubleshooting-Support testing activities for technology components and work with developers and infrastructure teams to troubleshoot errors during deployment phases.
  
  
͏
  
͏
  
͏
  
**Mandatory Skills:** Embedded and System Software .
  
  
**Experience:** 8-10 Years .
  
  
Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end-to-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA - as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

job.title: Python Intern @ Cokonet (KL, IN)
job.description:
We are looking for a passionate and enthusiastic Python Django Full Stack Developer Intern who is eager to build real-world web applications and gain hands-on industry experience. The intern will work on live projects involving Python, Django, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, REST APIs, and SaaS-based applications.

Candidates who have completed academic projects or internships in web development and are willing to learn modern development practices are encouraged to apply.

Roles & Responsibilities

* Assist in developing web applications using Python and Django.
* Build responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.
* Develop and integrate REST APIs.
* Work on database design and CRUD operations.
* Participate in the development of SaaS-based web applications.
* Assist in implementing authentication, authorization, and role-based access control for multiple user types.
* Debug, test, and optimize application performance.
* Collaborate with the development team on feature implementation and bug fixes.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
* Learn and follow software development best practices.

Required Skills

* Basic knowledge of Python programming.
* Familiarity with Django Framework.
* Good understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
* Basic understanding of relational databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL).
* Knowledge of REST APIs.
* Basic understanding of Git or version control.
* Good logical thinking and problem-solving skills.
* Willingness to learn new technologies.
* Preferred Skills
* Academic or personal projects developed using Django.
* Familiarity with LMS, ERP, CRM, or Student Management System projects.
* Understanding of multi-user applications with different user roles (Admin, Staff, Trainers, Learners, etc.).
* Basic understanding of SaaS application development.
* Knowledge of prompt engineering and AI-assisted software development.

Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Gemini, or similar tools for:

* Code generation
* Debugging
* Refactoring
* Documentation
* Process flow creation
* Learning new technologies efficiently

Eligibility

* Graduates in B.Tech, BCA, MCA, MSc Computer Science, or related fields.
* Candidates with a strong interest in Full Stack Web Development/certifications
* Strong programming knowledge and willingness to work on live projects.

Pay: ₹3,000.00 - ₹5,000.00 per month

Ability to commute/relocate:

* Ulloor, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala: Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Preferred)

Application Question(s):

* Are you ready to develop applications in Python?

Education:

* Bachelor's (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Software Developers - Fresher @ Kyzer Software (MH, IN)
job.description:
We are looking for a skilled and motivated Software Developers with 0 to 1 years of experience for high quality banking software development.

### **Responsibilities**

* + Design, develop, test, and maintain full stack applications using Angular 19+ on the frontend and Java / Spring Boot / Hibernate on the backend.
* + Build responsive, reusable, and high-performance user interfaces using Angular, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and related frontend technologies.
* + Develop and maintain robust backend services, business logic, and APIs using Java, Spring Boot, and Hibernate/JPA.
* + Work with relational databases such as MySQL
* + Ensure application security, code quality, performance, scalability, and maintainability by following engineering best practices.
* + Prepare and maintain technical documentation for application features, APIs, deployment steps, and architecture decisions.

### **Requirements**

* Frontend
* + Understanding of Angular 19 and above preferred
* + Understanding of TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 preferred
* Backend
* + Understanding of Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate / JPA
* + Strong understanding of object-oriented programming, design principles, and coding best practices
* Architecture & Database
* + Good knowledge of relational databases such as Oracle and MySQL.
* + Understanding of writing optimized SQL queries and handling data persistence effectively
* Preferred Qualifications
* + Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science /Information Technology, or B.Sc. – IT, MCA

job.title: Full Stack Developer - Systems Engineer @ AutoZone (IN)
job.description:
About AutoZone :

AutoZone is the nation's leading retailer and a leading distributor of automotive replacement parts and accessories with more than 6,000 stores in the US, Puerto Rico, Mexico, and Brazil. Each store carries an extensive line of cars, sport utility vehicles, vans, and light trucks, including new and remanufactured hard parts, maintenance items, and accessories.
  
We also sell automotive diagnostic and repair software through ALLDATA, diagnostic and repair information through ALLDATAdiy.com, automotive accessories through AutoAnything.com, and auto and light truck parts and accessories through AutoZone.com.
  
Since opening its first store in Forrest City, Ark. on July 4, 1979, the company has joined the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: AZO) and earned a spot in the Fortune 500.
  
AutoZone has been committed to providing the best parts, prices, and customer service in the automotive aftermarket industry. We have a rich culture and history of going the Extra Mile for our customers and our community. At AutoZone you’re not just doing a job; you’re playing a crucial role in creating a better experience for our customers while creating opportunities to DRIVE YOUR CAREER almost anywhere! We are looking for talented, customer-focused people, enjoy helping others, and have the DRIVE to excel in a fast-paced environment!

Position Summary

We are looking for a motivated System Engineer – Full Stack with solid hands-on experience in ReactJS and Java/Spring Boot development. The ideal candidate should be eager to learn modern full-stack architecture, passionate about building performant and scalable applications, and ready to contribute in a collaborative agile environment.

  

* Develop and maintain full-stack applications using React.js for the front-end and Java/Spring Boot for the back-end.
* Build dynamic, responsive, and accessible user interfaces using React.js, React Hooks, and React Router.
* Design and implement reusable React components following component-driven architecture principles.
* Develop RESTful APIs and microservices using Spring Boot.
* Implement state management solutions using Redux, Context API, or similar libraries.
* Write unit and integration tests for React components using Jest and React Testing Library.
* Work with relational databases (Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL) to design schemas, write optimized queries, and manage data persistence.
* Collaborate with UX/UI designers to translate wireframes and mockups into functional interfaces.
* Integrate front-end applications with RESTful APIs and handle API responses effectively.
* Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement of coding standards.
* Debug and resolve issues across the full stack.
* Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and automated testing processes.

  

Front-End

* Strong knowledge of React.js (v16.8+ with Hooks).
* Proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3/SASS/LESS.
* Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Context API, or Zustand).
* Understanding of React component lifecycle, virtual DOM, and rendering optimization.
* Familiarity with front-end build tools (Webpack, Vite, or Babel).
* Knowledge of UI frameworks (Material UI, Ant Design, or Tailwind CSS).
* Experience with front-end testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library)

  Back-End
* Strong knowledge of Java (8 or above).
* Hands-on experience with Spring Boot and RESTful API development.
* Understanding of Microservices architecture and design patterns.
* Experience with relational databases (Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL).
* Proficiency in writing SQL queries, stored procedures, and database optimization.
* Understanding of ORM frameworks (Hibernate, JPA).

  General
* Proficiency with Git and version control best practices.Strong problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills.
* Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
* AI Tool Proficiency: Active, daily use of AI coding assistants (like Copilot, Claude, or Replit) to generate boilerplate code and accelerate daily tasks.
* Prompting & Context: Ability to articulate context clearly and provide precise instructions to AI agents, rather than relying on generic prompts.

  Good to Have Skills
* Experience with GraphQL.
* Exposure to Next.js or other React-based frameworks.
* Knowledge of NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cassandra).
* Familiarity with Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
* Understanding of containerization tools (Docker).
* Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI).
* Knowledge of Web Performance APIs and Lighthouse auditing.
* Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG).
* Exposure to WebSockets or real-time communication.

  

AutoZone opened its first AutoZone do Brasil store in the city of Sorocaba in September 2012. Our customer-first mindset and commitment to Going the Extra Mile define who we are, for both our customers and AutoZoners. Working at AutoZone means being part of a team that values dedication, teamwork and growth. Whether you're helping customers or building your career, we provide tools and support to help you succeed and drive your future.

  

AutoZone, and its subsidiary, ALLDATA are equal opportunity employers. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to age, race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status, or any other legally protected categories.

job.title: Laravel Developer @ Param Software (GJ, IN)
job.description:
* Rajkot
* Full Time

**Job Details**
---------------

**Job Overview**

We are looking for an experienced **Full Stack Laravel Developer** who is proficient in developing and maintaining robust ERP solutions. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in full-stack development using Laravel and a good understanding of business logic in ERP systems.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and maintain high-quality web applications using Laravel.

* Work on customized ERP solutions tailored to client requirements.

* Collaborate with front-end developers, UI/UX designers, and other backend developers.

* Integrate third-party APIs and tools as needed.

* Ensure code quality through unit testing and peer code reviews.

* Participate in the full software development lifecycle: requirement gathering, architecture design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance.

* Troubleshoot, test, and maintain the core product software and databases to ensure strong optimization and functionality.

* Document the development process, architecture, and standard components.

**Required Skills & Qualifications**

* Minimum **3 years of hands-on experience** with the Laravel framework.

* Solid understanding of **PHP**, **MySQL**, and **OOP concepts**.

* Experience in **ERP development** will be a strong advantage.

* Proficient in front-end technologies like **HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Vue.js or React**.

* Familiarity with **version control tools** like Git.

* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently.

* Good communication and collaboration skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

* Prior experience with **RESTful APIs** and **Microservices Architecture**.

* Knowledge of **Laravel Framework.**

* Understanding of **Agile/Scrum methodologies**.

* Exposure to **cloud platforms** like AWS or Azure is a plus.

job.title: Senior Python Full Stack Developer @ Brainworks Solutions Pvt Ltd (MH, IN)

Role: Senior Python Full Stack Developer

Experience: 8–15 Years

Location: Indore / Pune / Bangalore

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly accomplished Senior Python Full Stack Developer with 8–15 years of experience in building scalable, enterprise-grade web applications. The ideal candidate must have strong expertise in Python, Django, SQL, cloud platforms (Azure/AWS), and modern frontend technologies such as React, Angular, or JavaScript. The role involves designing end-to-end full-stack solutions, developing secure backend services, building responsive user interfaces, and deploying cloud-native applications while mentoring development teams and driving engineering best practices.

Mandatory Skills (One Line)

Python, Django (5+ Years Mandatory), SQL (5+ Years Mandatory), Azure or AWS Cloud, React/Angular/JavaScript (3–4 Years Recent Experience), REST APIs, Microservices, Git, CI/CD.

Roles & Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain scalable enterprise web applications using Python and Django.

Build secure, high-performance RESTful APIs and microservices for enterprise applications.

Develop responsive and interactive user interfaces using React, Angular, or modern JavaScript frameworks.

Design efficient database schemas and write optimized SQL queries for high-performance applications.

Deploy, manage, and optimize cloud-native applications on Azure or AWS platforms.

Collaborate with DevOps teams to implement CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes.

Integrate frontend applications with backend APIs while ensuring security, scalability, and performance.

Participate in architecture discussions, technical design, code reviews, and implementation of best engineering practices.

Mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).

Troubleshoot production issues, optimize application performance, and ensure high availability.

Work closely with Product Owners, Architects, QA, and cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

Maintain technical documentation and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives following Agile methodologies.

Pay: Up to ₹4,300,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

job.title: JAVA Full Stack Developer Trainer/Faculty (MH, IN)
job.description:
WE’RE HIRING | Java Full Stack Developer Trainer / Faculty

**Organisation:** Netwisdome Training Institute  
**Location:** Nashik  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time | Visiting Faculty

**NOTE:** We are looking for professionals who are passionate about teaching, mentoring, and shaping the next generation of Full Stack Developers. **Minimum 1 year of experience is preferred. Candidates from Nashik or those willing to relocate to Nashik should apply.**

Are you passionate about **Java, Web Development, and Full Stack Technologies** and enjoy mentoring aspiring software developers?

Netwisdome Training Institute is looking for an experienced and enthusiastic **Java Full Stack Developer Trainer / Faculty** to deliver industry-oriented training and prepare students for real-world software development careers.

KEY SKILLS REQUIRED

✅ Strong knowledge of **Core Java** (Data Types, OOP, Collections, Exception Handling, File Handling)

✅ Expertise in **Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)** concepts

✅ Good understanding of **Advanced Java** (Multithreading, JDBC, Servlets, JSP, Lambda Expressions, Streams API)

✅ Experience with **Spring Framework** and **Spring Boot**

✅ Proficiency in **HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap 5, and Responsive Web Design**

✅ Strong knowledge of **JavaScript (ES6+)** and DOM Manipulation

✅ Knowledge of **Version Control using Git & GitHub**

✅ Strong understanding of **SQL and MySQL/PostgreSQL Database Management**

✅ Familiarity with **CRUD Operations and Database Design**

✅ Experience in integrating **Frontend with Backend APIs**

✅ Understanding of **Authentication & Authorization** (JWT, Spring Security, Session-Based Authentication)

✅ Knowledge of **AJAX, JSON, and API Integration**

✅ Experience with **Deployment on cloud platforms (AWS, Render, Railway, or similar)**

✅ Basic understanding of **Linux Commands and Server Environment**

✅ Knowledge of **Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)** and **Agile Methodology**

✅ Ability to build and guide students through **Live Projects and Real-Time Applications**

✅ Strong **debugging, problem-solving, and code optimization skills**

RESPONSIBILITIES

* Deliver classroom sessions and practical hands-on laboratory training.
* Conduct industry-oriented training in **Java Full Stack Development**.
* Guide students in **live projects, mini projects, capstone projects, and portfolio development**.
* Prepare students for **technical interviews and placement drives**.

Preferred Specializations

* Computer Engineering
* Information Technology
* Computer Science
* Electronics & Telecommunication
* Electronics Engineering

✔ Industry experience in **Java Full Stack Development** is preferred.

✔ Experience with **Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Security, React.js, REST APIs, SQL, and Git** is highly preferred.

✔ Strong practical coding skills and project development experience are encouraged.

✔ Minimum **1 year of teaching or industry experience** preferred.

✔ **Candidates residing in Nashik or willing to relocate to Nashik are encouraged to apply.**

DESIRED QUALITIES

✔ Excellent Communication Skills

✔ Passion for Teaching and Mentoring

✔ Strong Programming & Problem-Solving Skills

✔ Hands-on Project Development Experience

✔ Student Mentorship Ability

✔ Industry-Oriented Mindset

WHAT WE OFFER

✅ Competitive Salary

✅ Flexible Working Options

✅ Professional Growth Opportunities

✅ Industry-Focused Learning Environment

✅ Opportunity to Shape Future Full Stack Developers

job.title: Java Full Stack Architect -GENAI - Cloud-Native @ Capgemini (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Your Role**
-------------

* We are seeking an experienced **Platform, Cloud-Native & Full Stack Architect** to lead the design and modernization of enterprise-grade financial technology solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in **Java, React, Cloud-Native Architecture, Platform Engineering, and Microservices**, with a proven track record of delivering secure, scalable, and high-performance platforms in the **Banking, Payments, Capital Markets, Lending, or FinTech** domain.
* Define and drive architecture strategy for cloud-native platforms and digital financial applications.
* Lead modernization of legacy systems into microservices-based and containerized architectures.
* Architect end-to-end solutions across **Java backend, React frontend, APIs, integration, and cloud platforms**.
* Design secure, resilient, and highly available systems compliant with financial industry standards.
* Establish platform engineering, DevOps, CI/CD, observability, and automation frameworks.
* Collaborate with business, product, security, and engineering teams to deliver scalable financial solutions.
* Provide technical leadership, architecture governance, and mentoring to engineering teams.

**Your Profile**
----------------

* 12+ years of software engineering and architecture experience.
* Strong expertise in:
* **Java, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud**
* **React, TypeScript, JavaScript**
* **Microservices, REST APIs, Event-Driven Architecture**
* **Kafka or similar messaging platforms**
* **AWS, Azure, or GCP**
* **Kubernetes, OpenShift, Docker**
* **Terraform, CI/CD, DevOps, Platform Engineering**
* Strong understanding of security, scalability, performance, and distributed systems.
* **Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in **FinTech, Banking, Payments, Lending, Capital Markets, Wealth Management, or Insurance platforms**.
* Knowledge of payment gateways, digital banking platforms, regulatory compliance, fraud prevention, and financial data security.
* Experience with SaaS, multi-tenant platforms, and cloud transformation programs.
* Cloud and Kubernetes certifications preferred.

**What will you love working at Capgemini**
-------------------------------------------

* The company emphasizes **team spirit, trust, and innovation**, creating a positive and inclusive work environment. Employees often mention a sense of appreciation and purpose in their roles
* Capgemini scores **3.7/5** for work-life balance, with many developers appreciating the flexible work hours and hybrid work model
* You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
* You will have the opportunity to learn on one of the industry's largest digital learning platforms, with access to 250,000+ courses and numerous certifications.

job.title: Member Technical @ Broadridge (MH, IN)
job.description:
At Broadridge, we've built a culture where the highest goal is to empower others to accomplish more. If you’re passionate about developing your career, while helping others along the way, come join the Broadridge team.

**About the team**

We are dedicated to meeting the needs of the Financial Services Industry, specifically in the Capital Markets segment. All of our team members are passionate, analytical, and committed to our customers. If you’re interested in a challenging environment with lots of growth opportunities, then Broadridge is the place for you.

**About the role**

We have a defined need for a senior developer with a focus in scripting capabilities and troubleshooting. We are looking for qualified candidates who enjoy interacting with clients to be practitioners on our electronic trading systems. You will be working with tier 1 banks in a very dynamic environment.

**Responsibilities**

* Build full stack solutions and enhancements to the existing pipeline.
* Build new Application Programming Interfaces (API’s) for integrating with existing internally built workflow tools
* Creating reusable code for adding new client-specific customizations.
* Improve regression testing tools using the Firm’s proprietary technology.
* Work with regional teams to deliver enhancements to global on boarding processes.
* Must be willing to work with proprietary technologies. No knowledge of proprietary technology is required pre-hire.

**General Experience**

* Strong analytical and problem solving skills.
* Clear understanding of algorithms and data structures.
* At least 3-5 years of experience using Java, Python or equivalent OOPS language in the Linux environment.
* The end-to-end software development lifecycle (SDLC), including designing, developing, and deploying enterprise-scale technologies.
* Comfort with standard SDLC tools, e.g. version control systems (Git, CVS, SVN), build tools(Jenkins) or similar technologies.
* Clear understanding and distinction of how relational databases (such as SQL, Sybase or DB2 ) and non-relational databases (MongoDB, Cassandra) work.
* UI development, AngularJS or React development experience is a plus

**Client Delivery**

* Communicates effectively and encourages open communication
* Problem-solver: uncovers and understands certifying client needs, identifies root causes of problems, analyzes advantages of one approach vs. another, and develops and implements creative and pragmatic solutions

**Personal skills:**

* Ability to work in a fast paced environment; to be flexible and learn quickly.
* Ability to multi-task with attention to detail/ prioritize tasks.
* Experience with MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint.

**Preferred Characteristics**

* BA or BS degree in CS, MIS, Computer Information Systems, or a related field

We are dedicated to fostering a collaborative, engaging, and inclusive environment and are committed to providing a workplace that empowers associates to be authentic and bring their best to work. We believe that associates do their best when they feel safe, understood, and valued, and we work diligently and collaboratively to ensure Broadridge is a company—and ultimately a community—that recognizes and celebrates everyone’s unique perspective.

**Use of AI in Hiring**

As part of the recruiting process, Broadridge may use technology, including artificial intelligence (AI)-based tools, to help review and evaluate applications. These tools are used only to support our recruiters and hiring managers, and all employment decisions include human review to ensure fairness, accuracy, and compliance with applicable laws. Please note that honesty and transparency are critical to our hiring process. Any attempt to falsify, misrepresent, or disguise information in an application, resume, assessment, or interview will result in disqualification from consideration.

job.title: Senior Developer @ Soterius (UP, IN)
job.description:
**Job Summary**

We are seeking a skilled Full Stack Software Engineer to join our core engineering team

and contribute to building a scalable, compliant SaaS platform. In this role, you will

work across the entire technology stack, developing modern React-based user

interfaces, Node.js backend services, and PostgreSQL database solutions. You will take

ownership of features from design through deployment, collaborate closely with cross functional

teams, and help drive technical excellence in a fast-paced, early-stage

environment.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end features across React frontends and

Node.js/Express backends.

* Create and manage PostgreSQL database schemas, migrations, indexes, and

optimized queries.

* Build and maintain RESTful APIs with robust error handling, versioning, and

integration capabilities.

* Write and maintain unit, integration, and end-to-end tests to ensure application

reliability and quality.

* Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives, and

technical design discussions.

* Deploy and manage applications within containerized environments using

Docker and AWS services.

* Collaborate with Product, Design, and AI/ML teams to deliver seamless, well integrated

user experiences.

* Contribute to system scalability, performance optimization, and platform

compliance requirements.

* Follow best practices in source control, branching strategies, and pull request based

development workflows.

* Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues through systematic debugging and

root-cause analysis.

**Skills Required**

* 3–5 years of Full Stack development experience.
* Strong expertise in Node.js, React, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.
* Experience with ORMs (Prisma, Drizzle, etc.), REST APIs, and third-party

integrations.

* Proficiency in Git, Docker, testing frameworks, and Agile development practices.
* Hands-on experience with AWS services and CI/CD pipelines.
* Familiarity with Python (Fast API), multi-tenant SaaS platforms, and

Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/AWS CDK).

* Exposure to AI-assisted development tools, LLM integrations, and modern

architecture patterns (microservices/modular monoliths).

* Experience in compliance-driven environments and open-source contributions

is a plus.

job.title: Full Stack Developer @ PLUS UAE (KL, IN)
job.description:
Job Title: Full Stack Developer

Location: Infopark, Kochi, Kerala  
Job Type: Full-time, Permanent, Office-based

Job Summary

Plus UAE Group is looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer capable of managing the complete development lifecycle of websites, web applications, business portals and internal software.

The candidate must also have practical knowledge of SEO, digital marketing, marketing automation and AI tools. This position requires someone who can build, deploy, optimize and continuously improve digital platforms that generate leads and support business growth.

Key Responsibilities

Full Stack Development

* Develop responsive websites, web applications, dashboards and customer portals.
* Build and maintain front-end and back-end systems.
* Convert business requirements into secure, scalable digital solutions.
* Develop APIs and integrate third-party services.
* Design and manage databases.
* Implement authentication, user roles and permission controls.
* Develop CRM, lead-management, reporting and workflow features.
* Integrate websites and applications with email, WhatsApp, CRM and payment systems.
* Test, debug, deploy, document and maintain applications.
* Manage hosting, domains, DNS, SSL, backups and server environments.
* Optimize application speed, security, scalability and mobile responsiveness.
* Provide ongoing technical support and resolve production issues.

Website Development

* Develop and maintain corporate websites and high-converting landing pages.
* Manage WordPress and custom-coded websites.
* Implement enquiry forms, calculators, chatbots and lead-capture systems.
* Improve website design, navigation, user experience and conversion rates.
* Monitor website availability, performance and security.

SEO and Digital Marketing

* Perform technical, on-page, off-page and local SEO.
* Manage Google Analytics 4, Search Console and Tag Manager.
* Improve website rankings, organic traffic and lead generation.
* Develop SEO-friendly website structures and landing pages.
* Support Google Ads, Meta Ads and LinkedIn campaigns.
* Configure advertising pixels, conversion tracking and analytics.
* Integrate campaign leads with CRM and automated follow-up workflows.
* Support email, WhatsApp and omnichannel marketing activities.
* Measure traffic, cost per lead, conversions and campaign performance.

AI and Automation

* Use AI-assisted development tools for coding, testing and documentation.
* Build AI-powered chatbots, content tools and business-process automations.
* Automate lead capture, qualification, assignment, follow-up and reporting.
* Connect AI services with websites, applications, CRM, email and WhatsApp.
* Evaluate and implement new AI tools that improve productivity and customer experience.
* Maintain security, confidentiality and human review of AI-generated outputs.

Required Technical Skills

* HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript and TypeScript;
* React.js, Next.js or similar front-end frameworks;
* Node.js, PHP, Python or comparable back-end technologies;
* MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB or similar databases;
* REST APIs and third-party integrations;
* Git and version-control workflows;
* WordPress development and customization;
* Responsive design and UI/UX fundamentals;
* Hosting, cloud deployment, DNS, SSL and server management;
* Website security and performance optimization;
* Google Analytics, Search Console and Tag Manager;
* Technical SEO and conversion tracking;
* AI coding and automation tools.

Knowledge of Zoho, CRM systems, low-code platforms, workflow-automation tools, Google Ads, Meta Ads or LinkedIn Campaign Manager will be an advantage.

Candidate Requirements

* Minimum 5 years of full stack development experience.
* Strong portfolio of live websites, web applications or software products.
* Ability to manage projects independently from requirement gathering to deployment.
* Practical experience with SEO and digital-marketing integrations.
* Experience using AI development and automation tools.
* Strong debugging, analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Good understanding of application security and data protection.
* Good written and spoken English.
* Experience working on UAE or GCC projects is preferred.
* Must work full-time from the Infopark, Kochi office.

Key Performance Indicators

* Development projects delivered on schedule;
* Application reliability, security and performance;
* Website speed and uptime;
* Successful integrations and automations;
* Reduction in manual business processes;
* SEO and organic-traffic growth;
* Website lead-conversion improvement;
* Quality of code and technical documentation; and
* Speed of resolving technical issues.

Application Requirements

Applicants must submit:

* Updated CV;
* Portfolio and links to live projects;
* Details of front-end and back-end technologies used;
* GitHub profile or code samples;
* Examples of APIs and integrations completed;
* SEO or website-performance results;
* AI or automation projects completed; and
* Current salary, expected salary and availability to join.

Candidates without verifiable full stack project experience may not be shortlisted.

Pay: ₹25,000.00 - ₹30,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Full Stack Developer – AI Developer Portal @ Task Staffing (TS, IN)
job.description:

▪ Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript and React for building complex, production-grade frontend applications, combined with strong backend skills in Python and FastAPI.

▪ Proven experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs at scale, with a deep understanding of API versioning, authentication (OAuth), and contract-first development.

▪ Solid working knowledge of Kubernetes, GCP, containerization (Docker), and CI/CD pipelines within DevSecOps environments including GitHub Actions, Terraform, and infrastructure-as-code practices.

job.title: C Developer 3-5 years @ Jinendra infotech pvt ltd. (MH, IN)
job.description:
Software Engineer / Senior Software Engineer – Python

Backend Developer

Experience 3 – 4 Years

Location Pune, India

Key Skills Linux, Python, Django, Flask, REST API

We are looking for a skilled Python Backend Developer to design, build, and maintain robust

web services and APIs using Django and/or Flask. The ideal candidate is comfortable working

in Linux environments, has strong REST API development experience, and can write clean,

maintainable, and well-tested Python code.

Key Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and maintain backend applications and web services using Python.
* Build and maintain RESTful APIs using Django and/or Flask frameworks.
* Develop, deploy, and debug applications within Linux-based environments.
* Integrate applications with relational and/or NoSQL databases, ensuring efficient data

access.

* Write clean, reusable, and well-documented code following OOP and design-pattern best

practices.

* Write and maintain unit tests and support integration/regression testing efforts.
* Collaborate with front-end, QA, and DevOps teams to deliver features end-to-end.
* Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance issues and production defects.
* Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement of engineering

practices.

Required Skills & Experience

* 3-4 years of hands-on experience in Python application/backend development.
* Strong working experience with Django and/or Flask frameworks.
* Proven experience designing and building REST APIs.
* Good working knowledge of Linux/Unix operating systems and shell usage.
* Experience working with relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and/or NoSQL

databases.

* Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming and Python data structures.
* Experience with version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows.
* Familiarity with unit testing frameworks such as PyTest or unittest.

Good to Have

* Exposure to Docker/containerized deployments.
* Experience with message queues (Celery, RabbitMQ, Kafka).
* Working knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and Agile/Scrum practices.
* Basic front-end scripting exposure (JavaScript) for full-stack collaboration.

Educational Qualification

* B.E./B.Tech/MCA or equivalent degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field.

Incedo is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in its

Pay: ₹1,200,000.00 - ₹1,300,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

job.title: Lead Platform Engineer @ WSA (TS, IN)
job.description:
Driven by the passion to improve quality of people’s lives, WSA continues to grow as market leader in the hearing aid industry. With our commitment to increase penetration in an underserved hearing care market, we want to accelerate our business transformation in order to reach more people, more effectively.

We are looking for a **Lead Platform Engineer** who is passionate about cloud-native technologies, platform engineering, and developer experience. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, leading through technical expertise, and wants to grow toward a future Architect or Principal Engineer career path.

You will help evolve our Kubernetes-based platform, influence technical direction, and work closely with experienced architects and engineers to build the foundation for the next generation of digital products at WSA.

If you enjoy understanding how systems fit together, like influencing technical direction, and want to grow into broader technical leadership, we'd love to talk.

#### **What you will do**

* Design, build, and operate cloud-native platform capabilities that improve reliability, scalability, and developer productivity
* Help evolve our Kubernetes-based Internal Developer Platform (IDP), making it easier for teams to build and deliver software
* Contribute to architectural decisions and technical roadmaps while developing your own architecture skills
* Explore and industrialize emerging platform capabilities for AI and agentic workloads, including AI gateways, agent runtimes, governance controls, observability, and developer self-service experiences
* Evaluate and prototype cloud-native technologies from the CNCF ecosystem such as observability, GitOps, service mesh, developer tooling, and platform automation
* Collaborate with development teams to improve developer experience and create a smooth software delivery journey
* Drive improvements in Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps workflows, and operational excellence
* Help establish engineering best practices and contribute to technical standards through design discussions and Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
* Work closely with platform architects, security engineers, and operations teams to build resilient and compliant cloud environments
* Share knowledge with colleagues through workshops, technical guidance, and day-to-day collaboration

#### **What you bring**

* Approximately 5-10 years of experience in software engineering, platform engineering, infrastructure engineering, or related fields
* Solid hands-on experience with Kubernetes in production environments
* Experience building or operating cloud-native platforms, infrastructure, or SaaS solutions
* Knowledge of cloud platforms (Azure preferred) and infrastructure automation
* Experience with CI/CD, GitOps, and Infrastructure as Code technologies such as OpenTofu, Pulumi, Bicep, Terraform, or similar tools
* Interest in platform engineering concepts and modern cloud-native practices
* Curiosity about architecture and a desire to broaden your technical influence over time.

We are looking for engineers with strong technical foundations, a systems-thinking mindset, and the ambition to expand their impact beyond individual projects.

If you've ever found yourself asking questions like "How should this platform evolve?", "How do these systems fit together?", or "How can we make life easier for other engineers?", you're likely the kind of person we're looking for.

*Personal competencies*

* Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for engineering excellence
* Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly and effectively
* Enjoy collaborating with engineers across multiple teams
* Comfortable balancing hands-on implementation with longer-term thinking
* Curious, open-minded, and eager to learn new technologies
* Proactive in identifying opportunities for improvement and driving them forward
* Passionate about creating great developer experiences and scalable engineering platforms

**Why join us?**

The team you will join sits at the heart of WSA’s digital engineering ecosystem, building and operating the platforms that enable teams across the company to deliver secure, scalable, and reliable software.

We own the cloud foundations that support WSA’s technology landscape, providing the core infrastructure, automation, governance, and platform capabilities used by engineering teams across the organization. In addition, we are responsible for the infrastructure and software delivery capabilities that power a global medical SaaS solution serving healthcare professionals and customers around the world.

Beyond infrastructure, the team develops and operates a growing portfolio of internal platform products designed to improve developer productivity and accelerate software delivery. These include our source-to-deployment automation platform, developer portal, namespaces-as-a-service capabilities, and other self-service tools that help engineering teams build, deploy, and operate applications efficiently and securely.

This is a unique opportunity to work across multiple layers of the technology stack: from cloud infrastructure and Kubernetes platforms to developer experience, software delivery, platform products, and globally distributed healthcare solutions.

You will work alongside experienced platform engineers and architects while expanding your own technical leadership and architectural thinking. We believe the best technical leaders stay close to the technology, understand the realities engineers face, and lead through a combination of expertise, collaboration, and execution.

At WSA, you will have the freedom to explore new ideas, improve the platforms that power our engineering organization, and make a tangible impact on how software is built and operated across the company. With that freedom comes trust, ownership, and the opportunity to contribute to products and platforms that support millions of people worldwide.

#### **Who we are**

At WSA, we provide innovative hearing aids and hearing health services.

Together with our 12,000 colleagues in 130 countries, we invite you to help unlock human potential by bringing back hearing for millions of people around the world.

With us, you will become part of a truly global company where we care for one another, welcome diversity and celebrate our successes.

Sounds wonderful? We can't wait to hear from you.

*WSA is an equal-opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive employee experience for all. Regardless of race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, ancestry, disability, military or veteran status we firmly believe that our work is at its best when everyone feels free to be their most authentic self.*

job.title: Software Engineer, Senior @ Infor (TS, IN)
job.description:
### **Description**

We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to design, develop, and deliver high-quality software solutions across our cloud product portfolio. As a critical member of our agile engineering team, you will drive technical excellence, mentor junior engineers, and contribute to the evolution of Infor’s next-generation applications.

### **A Typical Day in the Life Includes:**

  

* Lead the design, development, and deployment of scalable and secure applications.
* Collaborate cross-functionally with Product Management, UX Design, and QA to deliver business-critical features.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following industry best practices.
* Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and technical roadmap planning.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives around software performance, reliability, and scalability.
* Mentor and guide junior developers through knowledge sharing and code collaboration.
* Stay current on emerging technologies and evaluate their potential adoption.
* Champion Infor’s values of speed, innovation, and collaboration.

Basic Qualifications:

* Experience in software development, ideally within SaaS or enterprise applications.
* Experience in (programming languages relevant to the product stack — e.g., Java, C#, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript).
* Experience of cloud-native development (AWS, Azure, or similar platforms).
* Experience with microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience with Agile methodologies and CI/CD practices.

  

### **Basic Qualifications:**

  

* Experience in software development, ideally within SaaS or enterprise applications.
* Experience in (programming languages relevant to the product stack — e.g., Java, C#, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript).
* Experience of cloud-native development (AWS, Azure, or similar platforms).
* Experience with microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience with Agile methodologies and CI/CD practices.

### **Preferred Qualifications:**

  

* Experience of enterprise security and performance tuning techniques.
* Experience with DevOps toolchains and practices.
* Experience mentoring, coaching, and developing engineering talent.

### **About Infor**

**About Infor**

Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn't just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you're not just building a career. you're helping to build what's next.

Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business-wide digital transformation.  
  
For more information visit www.infor.com

**Our Values**

At Infor, we strive for an environment that is founded on a business philosophy called Principle Based Management™ (PBM™) and eight Guiding Principles: integrity, stewardship & compliance, transformation, principled entrepreneurship, knowledge, humility, respect, self-actualization.

We have a relentless commitment to a culture based on PBM™. Informed by the principles that allow a free and open society to flourish, PBM™ prepares individuals to innovate, improve, and transform while fostering a healthy, growing organization that creates long-term value for its clients and supporters and fulfillment for its employees.
